A log of our rescue

Past Events

A living record of the fundraisers, adoption events, performances, workshops, and community gatherings that have supported Peace4Paws over the years. Each event is a card — select one to see the flier and a fuller recap.

Event flier

Peace4Paws

All-volunteer 501(c)(3) dog rescue serving Northern New Jersey since 2007. We are not a shelter. We find homes, one dog at a time.

217 Center Avenue, Westwood, NJ 07675
(201) 280-8696 · compassion@peace4paws.org
